metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7 main-session-as-orchestrator with V4.7.2 conversation-flow + tool-set patches. Stop hook now blocks main-session self-stop in execute/review/verify/finish stages when no specialist was spawned this turn — closes the V4.7.0/V4.7.1 coverage gap on the conversation-flow layer. Specialists (designer/architect/executor/verifier/reviewer/researcher/debugger/test-engineer) get MCP tool whitelists (pencil/chrome-devtools/playwright/context7/gpt-researcher) so they can use the MCP servers the user has installed.
